sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, name String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '中国'), (2, '日本'), (3, '韩国');
SELECT id, name FROM test_strings WHERE endsWithUTF8(name, '国');
UPDATE test_strings SET name = '中华人民共和国' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, endsWithUTF8(name, '国家') AS is_suffix FROM test_strings;
